---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Practical guides, methodology notes, and regulatory context for pharma statisticians working in R. Written by Ndoh Penn."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---
